consistency.level_and_scaling: Consistent. Level 4 spell scaling increases bludgeoning damage by 1d8 per slot level above 4th.
consistency.damage_types: Consistent. Deals both bludgeoning and cold damage as described.
consistency.area_of_effect: Consistent. Defines a specific volumetric area (20-foot-radius, 40-foot-high cylinder).

quality.readability: High. The description is clear, separating damage, area effect manipulation (difficult terrain), and scaling.
quality.completeness: High. All standard D&D 5e spell components (slug, name, level, school, casting, range, components, duration, description, classes) are present.
quality.flavor: Moderate. Directly describes the mechanical effects of the storm (hailstones, ice pounding).

mechanics.saving_throw: Dexterity saving throw, standard for area denial/damage spells.
mechanics.scaling_impact: Scaling only affects bludgeoning damage (1d8 per level above 4th). Cold damage remains static, which is typical for area-of-effect spells when scaling affects only one damage type.
mechanics.terrain_effect: The immediate area becomes difficult terrain until the end of the caster's next turn, providing a tactical advantage after the initial damage blast.
